items.title: Arsenal v Manchester United, Manchester City v Chelsea: Women’s League Cup semi-finals – live
items.summary: ⚽ Four heavyweights fight to reach final from 7pm GMT ⚽ Get our Moving the Goalposts newsletter | Email Billy City launch their first significant attack as Hemp looks for Clinton down the right. Baltimore gets back for Chelsea and wins a throw-in. 4 mins gone, 0-0. Big chance for Arsenal! Straight from kick-off, the Gunners go for the jugular. Russo crosses from the right for Maanum and her header is well saved by Tullis-Joyce in the United goal. 2 mins gone, 0-0. Continue reading...

items.title: Marseille v Liverpool: Champions League – live
items.summary: ⚽ Champions League updates from the 8pm GMT kick-off ⚽ Live scores | Table | Follow us on Bluesky | Mail Michael Arne Slot speaks to the TNT cameras pitchside: It’s not the first time we play in a hostile stadium. We played at Galatasaray. It’s a great stadium [here], great atmosphere. The moments where I didn’t play him, we were struggling and I tried something else. We have steadied the ship now but we miss goals from all the ball possession and chances that we have. Salah is one of the players that can score a goal. First of all, it’s really sad that Ibrahima can’t be here. But Joe is a good replacement but he has not played a lot since I have been here. But he has shown he can be a really good player for us. Continue reading...

items.title: Chelsea v Pafos, Newcastle v PSV, Juventus v Benfica, and more: Champions League – live
items.summary: ⚽ Champions League updates from the 8pm GMT kick-offs ⚽ Live scoreboard | Table | Follow us on Bluesky | Mail Luke “Just a heads up that, while I would love it to be true, a win tonight for Newcastle doesn’t put us in the last 16,” writes David. “It puts us in the first round of 16, which is really the last 24 (playoffs), to then get into the actual last 16. Two extra matches just what everyone wants right now …” Silly me. Thanks David. Continue reading...

items.title: VI Live: Liverpool dicht bij 0-1 in Marseille, Barcelona op achterstand in Praag
items.summary: Atlético Madrid, Barcelona, Liverpool, Juventus, Bayern München en Chelsea. Een handjevol clubs die vanavond in actie komen in de competitiefase van de Champions League. Mis er in deze VI Live niets van. Newcastle United - PSV volgen we in een speciale VI Live .

items.title: VI Live: PSV snijdt zich opnieuw in de vingers, Newcastle verdubbelt voorsprong
items.summary: PSV stuit woensdag op Newcastle United in speelronde zeven van de competitiefase van de Champions League. In deze VI Live mis je niets van dat belangrijke duel.

items.title: Go Ahead Eagles en de olifant in de perskamer
items.summary: Het zijn drukke transferdagen bij Go Ahead Eagles, met het aanstaande vertrek van Milan Smit en Mats Deijl en de zoektocht naar vervangers. Technisch manager Marc van Hintum draait overuren in wat voor Go Ahead-begrippen een hectische transferweek is. En dan wordt er donderdagavond ook nog gevoetbald.

items.title: Daal denkt door ontslag Martens niet meer aan vertrek bij AZ
items.summary: Ro-Zangelo Daal leek op weg naar de uitgang bij AZ, maar door het ontslag van trainer Maarten Martens en het doorschuiven van trainer Leeroy Echteld is die situatie veranderd.

items.title: Ajax bevestigt tijdelijk vertrek Van den Boomen
items.summary: Ajax heeft het vertrek van Branco van den Boomen bevestigd. De middenvelder zal tot het einde van het seizoen worden verhuurd aan het Franse Angers.

items.title: Man City players to refund fans after Bodø loss
items.summary: Manchester City's captains have announced they will refund the cost of tickets for nearly 400 supporters.

items.title: Salah in Liverpool XI after rocky pre-AFCON exit
items.summary: Mohamed Salah is starting again for Liverpool in the Champions League at Marseille on Wednesday in his return from the Africa Cup of Nations.

items.title: Hayes: Returning Rodman ready for 'next steps'
items.summary: USWNT coach Emma Hayes said Trinity Rodman is ready to shoulder more responsibility and take the "next steps" in her career as she returns to the national team.

items.title: Sources: Mateta tells Palace he wants to leave
items.summary: France forward Jean-Philippe Mateta has told Crystal Palace he wants to leave the club, sources confirmed to ESPN.

items.title: Champions League updates: Marseille host Liverpool, Chelsea's Rosenior makes UCL debut
items.summary: Enjoy Wednesday's UEFA Champions League action with matches such as Marseille against Liverpool, Juventus against Benfica and Slavia Prague against Barcelona.

items.title: Southampton lead Sheff Utd! Boro trail at Stoke | Championship on Sky LIVE!
PSV gifting Newcastle goals as Gordon doubles Toon lead LIVE!
Villa's injury woes worsen as McGinn set for spell out
items.summary: Injury-hit Aston Villa suffer another blow, with captain John McGinn facing a number of weeks on the sidelines.

items.title: Liverpool have goal ruled out by VAR at Marseille LIVE!
Aston Villa consider move for Loftus-Cheek with fears over Kamara knee injury
items.summary: Villa thought to favour loan for Milan midfielder Club also in market for striker, with Mateta among targets Aston Villa are exploring a move for Milan’s Ruben Loftus-Cheek, as they seek to absorb the absence of Boubacar Kamara amid fears he will miss the rest of the season with a knee injury. Villa are poised to step up interest in the former Chelsea midfielder, who in September was recalled to the England squad after a six-year absence but was omitted from Thomas Tuchel’s most recent camp in November. Continue reading...

items.title: Cobden to miss Cheltenham rides through shoulder injury
items.summary: Harry Cobden will miss Cheltenham’s meeting on Saturday having failed to sufficiently recover in time from an injury picked up in a fall at Ascot last weekend.

items.title: Spurs, Arsenal or Newcastle - which teams have had most injuries?
items.summary: BBC Sport crunches the numbers to assess which Premier League teams have been hit hardest by injuries this season.
